title: 🗳️ Help Shape the Future of Advanced Templates!

posts.author: andrewp (Andrzej P)
posts.cookedHtml:
Advanced Templates lets you create and apply customizable templates for board groups, items, and subitems on monday.com.
Turn your templates into items manually or supercharge your workflows with automations!

We’re looking to bring item templating to the next level, and we need your input. Which feature would make your work much easier? Vote below!

Possible Features to Add:
Schedule recurring item creation directly in Advanced Templates with a calendar view
Define Item Update Templates for new tasks
Support for Dependency Columns to link items or subitems
Automatically derive values from parent items in subitems
Add support for more column types (Location, Phone, Hour, Rating, Week)
Enable monday Workflow Blocks integration
Automate subitem creation
Use templates in Connect Boards to create related items
Support File Column to upload and reuse files in new items
Add templates for Doc Columns with default document contents

Vote Now! Share your thoughts in the poll below. Your input helps us prioritize what’s next!

Don’t forget to comment if you have another feature in mind. Let’s build something amazing together!

  • Schedule recurring item creation directly in Advanced Templates with a calendar view
  • Define Item Update Templates for new tasks
  • Support for Dependency Columns to link items or subitems
  • Automatically derive values from parent items in subitems
  • Add support for more column types (Location, Phone, Hour, Rating, Week)
  • Enable monday Workflow Blocks integration
  • Automate subitem creation
  • Use templates in Connect Boards to create related items
  • Support File Column to upload and reuse files in new items
  • Add templates for Doc Columns with default document contents
0 voters
